---
pagetitle: "Careers | Yin Insurance and Financial Services, Inc."
description: "Join our team at Yin Insurance and Financial Services, Inc. in Norcross, GA. View current job openings."
---

::: {.careers-hero}
# Careers

Join our growing team and build a rewarding career in insurance and financial services.
:::

::: {.job-card}
::: {.job-card-header}
## Market Research Analyst

::: {.job-meta}
[📍 Norcross, GA]{style="margin-right:1.5rem;"} [🕘 Full-Time · Mon–Fri, 9 AM – 5 PM]{style="margin-right:1.5rem;"} [⏱️ 40 hrs/week]{}
:::
:::

::: {.job-card-body}

### About the Role

We are seeking a **Market Research Analyst** to join our team at our Norcross, GA office. This role is central to driving data-informed marketing strategy across the insurance and financial services space.

### Responsibilities

- Conduct comprehensive market research and data analysis to evaluate consumer behavior, market trends, and competitive positioning in the insurance and financial services industry.
- Design and implement both quantitative and qualitative research projects, including customer surveys, focus groups, and service marketing assessments in the digital era.
- Utilize statistical tools and data visualization techniques to interpret complex marketing data and present clear, actionable insights.
- Oversee digital marketing and social media campaigns to assess performance metrics, engagement levels, and brand visibility.
- Collaborate with management to develop marketing strategies, promotional initiatives, and client outreach programs informed by market intelligence.
- Prepare reports, visual dashboards, and multimedia presentations to communicate marketing findings and recommendations to leadership.

### Qualifications

- **Education:** Master's Degree in Marketing
- **Required Knowledge Areas:**
  - Marketing Research
  - Data Visualization
  - Digital Marketing
  - Consumer Behavior

### Schedule & Compensation

- **Hours:** Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (40 hours per week)
- **Location:** 5380 Peachtree Industrial Blvd, Suite 240, Norcross, GA 30071

::: {.apply-box}
### How to Apply

Mail your resume to:

**Yin Insurance and Financial Services, Inc.**
5380 Peachtree Industrial Blvd, Suite 240
Norcross, GA 30071
:::

:::
:::
